# PERF-038-done positive: unbuffered work channel still fires (done-signal narrow is orthogonal)
lang: go
file: PERF-038-done-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func Pipeline(input []int) {
	ch := make(chan int)
	go func() {
		for v := range ch {
			fmt.Println(v)
		}
	}()
	for _, v := range input {
		ch <- v
	}
}
